subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! Hearken unto that which the Tongue of Grandeur hath spoken in this most exalted station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء ان استمعوا ما نطق به لسان الکبریاء فی هذا المقام الاعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
